overall.description: First-person footage of walking along a forest trail at night using a headlamp or flashlight. The warm artificial light illuminates a dirt path winding through grass and birch trees, with the surrounding forest remaining dark beyond the beam's reach.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail, illuminating the path ahead with a headlamp while passing birch trees on the left

entered.detail: unpaved dirt path winding through the forest, illuminated by the warm light
group of white-barked birch trees with green leaves lining the left side of the trail
tall green grass growing along the left edge of the dirt path
tall green grass growing along the right edge of the dirt path
thick tree trunk with rough bark visible on the left side of the frame

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a forest trail at night. The headlamp illuminates a dirt path bordered by grass verges, with a cluster of birch trees visible on the left. The surroundings are dark beyond the reach of the artificial light, and the camera moves steadily forward through the narrow enclosed trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: denser forest section with rocky outcrops

events.description: gray rocks become visible on the right side of the trail as the path approaches a denser cluster of trees

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward along the trail, approaching a denser section of forest with visible rocks on the right

entered.detail: cluster of large gray rocks situated on the right side of the trail among the grass
dense grouping of thin tree trunks and foliage directly ahead on the path

segments.scene_description: As the walk continues, the trail enters a denser section of forest. Rocks become visible on the right side of the path while the camera approaches a thick cluster of trees ahead. The previously nearby birch trees and large trunk recede into the left background as the camera advances toward the darker, more enclosed area ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a nighttime forest trail that transitions from an open path into a denser, more enclosed woodland. It begins with a headlamp illuminating a dirt path bordered by grass verges and a cluster of birch trees on the left. As the camera moves steadily forward, the surrounding darkness presses in and the initial birch trees recede into the background. The scene then shifts as the trail enters a thicker section of the forest, where rocks appear along the right side of the path. Finally, the camera advances toward a dense cluster of trees ahead, deepening the sense of enclosure within the dark woods.
